notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto doubles (9) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Victor Scott II. Michael Busch to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto flies out sharply to center fielder Victor Scott II.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Gorman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Gorman challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Nolan Gorman called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Jordan Walker GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Walker grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Iván Herrera out at 2nd. Jordan Walker out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Masyn Winn GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Masyn Winn grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to first baseman Michael Busch. Nelson Velázquez out at 3rd. Alec Burleson to 2nd. Masyn Winn out at 1st.
